verifiedBadge.title: Verified account
verifiedBadge.description: Email, phone, identity, and address checks are complete. This helps you trade with more confidence.

market.title: Market
market.noAdsDescription: Create an {currency} ad to get started, or switch to another currency.
market.noBalanceDescription: Your sell ads are hidden from the marketplace when your P2P Wallet balance is zero. Transfer funds to your P2P Wallet to make them visible again.

lowCompletion.title: This advertiser has a low completion rate
lowCompletion.body: They complete {rate}% of their trades. Check their profile before you continue.

highBlockCount.title: Many traders have blocked this advertiser
highBlockCount.body: {threshold} or more traders have chosen not to trade with them. Check their profile before you continue.

secureTradeReminder.title: Quick reminders for a secure trade
secureTradeReminder.description: Stick to the time limit and stay on our platform. External contact risks your funds and may lead to account suspension.

order.paymentTimeTooltip: Complete your payment within {minutes} minutes after placing the order.
order.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Add funds to your wallet before creating an order.
order.orderExists: You already have an active order for this ad. Complete the existing order before placing a new one.
order.orderCreationError: There was an error when creating the order. Please try again.
order.verificationLockedDescription: There were too many incorrect verification attempts. Try again in 1 hour.
order.insufficientFundsDescription: There aren't enough funds to place this order right now. Try again later or choose another ad.
order.adNotAvailableDescription: This ad isn't available right now. Try again in a few minutes or choose another ad.
order.adCountryInvalidDescription: This ad is not available in your country. Choose another ad that supports your location.
order.userReadOnlyDescription: You can view your existing P2P orders, but you cannot create or update ads or place new orders right now. Contact us if you need help.
order.duplicateRequestDescription: This order was sent twice. Check your orders before trying again.
order.migrationInProgressDescription: We're updating your account. Try again in a few minutes.
order.advertiserTempUnavailableDescription: This seller's account is updating. Try again soon or choose another ad.
order.advertiserFundsInsufficientDescription: The advertiser does not have enough balance to complete this order. Choose another ad or try again later.
order.withdrawalLimitDescription: Verify your account to make more withdrawals.
order.financialAssessmentDescription: Complete your financial assessment to make more withdrawals.
order.tempLockedDescription: This order is being updated. Try again in a few seconds.
order.exchangeRateRequiredDescription: This order needs an exchange rate. Enter the agreed rate to continue.
order.fixedRateDescription: Set a constant rate, unaffected by market fluctuations.
order.floatingRateDescription: Set a rate that changes with market movements.
order.advertiserBlockedMessage: You won't be able to place an order with this advertiser. To unblock them, go to your profile.
order.transferUnsuccessfulMessage: We couldn't transfer the funds for this order. Try again or choose another ad.
order.advertiserOfflineMessage: This advertiser is not online right now. Try again later or choose another ad.
order.advertiserUnavailableMessage: This advertiser is not available at this time. Try again later or choose another ad.
order.adNotAvailableMessage: This ad is no longer available. Choose another ad.
order.ownAdMessage: You cannot place an order on your own ad. Choose another ad.
order.adPrivateMessage: This ad is restricted to specific users. Choose another ad.
order.adUnlistedMessage: This ad has been unlisted by the advertiser. Choose another ad.
order.userNotFavouriteMessage: This ad is only available to the advertiser's favourite counterparties. Choose another ad.
order.amountTooHighMessage: The amount you entered exceeds the maximum for this ad. Enter a lower amount.
order.amountTooLowMessage: The amount you entered is below the minimum for this ad. Enter a higher amount.
order.buyLimitMessage: You've reached your daily buy limit. Adjust your amount or try again tomorrow.
order.orderLimitMessage: You've reached the maximum number of orders for today. Try again tomorrow.
order.sellLimitMessage: You've reached your daily sell limit. Adjust your amount or try again tomorrow.
order.paymentMethodNotSupportedMessage: This payment method is not supported for this ad. Choose a different payment method.
order.temporarilyBarredMessage: You're temporarily unable to place orders. Try again later.
order.tradeBandMessage: Your order amount doesn't meet the trade limit requirements for this ad.
order.userInsufficientFundsMessage: You don't have enough balance to place this order. Add funds to your account and try again.
order.paymentMethodNotAvailableMessage: This payment method is no longer available on your account. Choose a different payment method.
order.scheduleConflictMessage: Your schedule doesn't overlap with this advertiser's available hours. Update your schedule or try another ad.
order.orderTypeNotAllowedMessage: You're not allowed to place this type of order. Contact support for more information.
order.accountIssueMessage: Your account has been disabled. Contact support for help.
order.accountRestrictedMessage: Your account has been temporarily restricted. View your profile for more details.
order.rateSlippageBuyMessage: The rate for {pay}/{acc} has changed. Review the new rate and confirm to continue.
order.rateSlippageSellMessage: The rate for {acc}/{pay} has changed. Review the new rate and confirm to continue.
order.genericMessage: An error occurred. Please try again.
order.genericWithCodeMessage: An error occurred ({code}). Please try again.
order.err9001Message: A server error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
order.err9002Message: A server error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
order.err9003Message: A server error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
order.err9004Message: A server error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
order.chooseCurrencyMessage: Your account currency is not supported for this ad. Change your currency to continue.
order.floatRateMessage: Float rate ads are not available right now. Try a fixed rate ad instead.
order.choosePaymentCurrencyMessage: The payment currency for this ad is not supported. Change your payment currency to continue.
order.orderExistsMessage: You already have an active order for this ad. Complete the existing order before placing a new one.
order.v1DebitFailedMessage: We couldn't process the payment for this order. Try again or choose another ad.
order.rateChangeIntro: The exchange rate for your order has changed.
order.rateChangeDetails: You're {action} {amount} {accountCurrency} for {total} {paymentCurrency}, but the new rate is {newRate} {paymentCurrency}.
order.rateChangeContinue: Would you like to continue with the new rate?

paymentMethod.title: Payment method
paymentMethod.addCompatibleMethod: Add a supported payment method to continue
paymentMethod.addSupportedMethod: Add a supported payment method to continue
paymentMethod.addOneOfTheseMethods: Add one of these payment methods
paymentMethod.duplicateMethodDescription: A payment method with the same values already exists. Add a new one.
paymentMethod.invalidMethodDescription: This payment method has invalid details. Edit it or choose a different method.
paymentMethod.invalidFieldDescription: One of the payment method fields is not recognised. Check and update the details.
paymentMethod.notFoundDescription: This payment method is not available. Choose another method or add a new one.
paymentMethod.requiredFieldDescription: A required field is empty for this payment method. Fill in all required fields to continue.
paymentMethod.addError: There was an error when adding the payment method. Please try again.
paymentMethod.searchDifferent: Search for a different payment method.

complaint.title: Make a complaint
complaint.buyer_underpaid: I received less than the agreed amount
complaint.buyer_overpaid: I received more than the agreed amount
complaint.buyer_third_party_payment_method: I received payment from a third party
complaint.seller_not_released: I made the payment, but the seller hasn't released the funds
complaint.buyer_underpaid_buyer: I couldn't complete the full payment
complaint.buyer_overpaid_buyer: I paid more than the agreed amount
complaint.helpText: If your issue isn't listed, contact us via live chat for help.
complaint.subtitle: We review complaints within 6 hours. Both parties will be asked for evidence.
complaint.warningTitle: Complaints are recorded on your account
complaint.warningBodyPrefix: If you ignore follow-ups or provide false information, your account may be
complaint.confirmCheckbox: I confirm my information is accurate. I will respond to follow-ups within 6 hours.
complaint.buyer_not_paid_hint: We'll ask which account, when you checked it, and a screenshot of your statement.
complaint.buyer_underpaid_hint: We'll ask for the amount you received and a screenshot of your statement.
complaint.buyer_overpaid_hint: We'll ask for the amount you received and a screenshot of your statement.
complaint.buyer_third_party_payment_method_hint: We'll ask for the actual sender's name shown on your statement.
complaint.seller_not_released_hint: We'll ask for your payment confirmation and a screenshot of your statement.
complaint.buyer_underpaid_buyer_hint: We'll ask for the amount you paid and a screenshot of your statement.
complaint.buyer_overpaid_buyer_hint: We'll ask for the amount you paid and a screenshot of your statement.

chat.disclaimerText: Deriv will never contact you via WhatsApp to ask for your personal information. Always ignore any messages from numbers claiming to be from Deriv.
chat.disclaimerNoteText: In case of a dispute, we'll use this chat as a reference.
chat.errorPii: Please avoid sharing personal information like phone numbers, addresses, or ID details for your security.
chat.errorLink: Links and URLs are not permitted in this chat.
chat.errorProfanity: Please keep the conversation professional and avoid offensive language.
chat.errorPromotionalContent: Promotional content and advertisements are not allowed.
chat.errorOffPlatformCommunication: Please keep the conversation within this platform. We cannot assist with requests to communicate elsewhere.
chat.errorHumanAttention: Threatening or harassing language is not tolerated. Please communicate respectfully.
chat.errorHarassment: Please do not impersonate Deriv staff or misrepresent your identity.
chat.errorFakeIdentity: Never share passwords, OTPs, or login credentials. Deriv staff will never ask for this information in chat.
chat.errorSensitiveDataRequests: Your message requires additional review. Please wait while we connect you with a specialist.
chat.errorMiscellaneous: Your message doesn't meet our community guidelines. Please try again.
chat.fileTooLargeDescription: Attachments must be 5 MB or less. Compress the file or send a smaller one.

orderDetails.title: Order details
orderDetails.cashTransactionWarning: Cash transactions may carry risks. For safer payments, use bank transfers or e-wallets.
orderDetails.dontCancelIfPaid: Don't cancel if you've already paid.
orderDetails.textCopiedToClipboard: The text has been copied to your clipboard.
orderDetails.ratingDeadline: You have until {deadline} to rate this transaction.
orderDetails.awaitingPaymentTooltip: Wait for the buyer to complete their payment.
orderDetails.failedToLoadOrderDetails: Failed to load order details. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bronzeTierDescription: Default tier for new users with basic trading limits.
profile.silverTierDescription: Trusted trader with higher limits and proven activity.
profile.goldTierDescription: Experienced trader with strong history and higher privileges.
profile.diamondTierDescription: Top-tier trader with maximum daily limits and excellent record.
profile.tradePartnersTooltip: Total number of users you've successfully traded with.
profile.tradeVolumeLifetimeTooltip: The total value of all trades completed in your lifetime.
profile.tradeVolume30DaysTooltip: The total value of all completed trades in the last 30 days.
profile.startFollowing: Start following users to see them here.
profile.whenUsersFollow: When users follow you, they'll appear here.
profile.unfollowDescription: You're about to unfollow this user. You'll lose quick access to their profile and active ads.
profile.blockDescription: You won't see ads from this user, and they won't be able to contact you.
profile.unblockDescription: Unblock them if you'd like to interact with this advertiser again.
profile.blockedUsersAppear: Users you block will appear here.
profile.noCounterpartiesDescription: Traders you have traded with will appear here.
profile.errorBlockingUser: Failed to block user. Please try again.
profile.errorUnblockingUser: Failed to unblock user. Please try again.
profile.startAddingPaymentMethods: You haven't added any payment method yet.
profile.deletePaymentMethodDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this payment method?
profile.unableToDeletePaymentMethod: Unable to delete this payment method.
profile.paymentMethodLinkedToOrder: This payment method is linked to one of your orders and can't be deleted.
profile.paymentMethodLinkedToAd: This payment method is linked to one of your ads and can't be deleted.
profile.unableToUpdatePaymentMethod: Unable to update this payment method.
profile.paymentMethodInUseByOrder: This payment method is currently being used by an open order and cannot be modified.
profile.cannotUpdatePaymentMethod: You can't update this payment method
profile.validationSymbolsOnly: Only letters, numbers, spaces, and symbols -+.,'#@():; are allowed

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.noAssetsDescription: Make your first deposit and begin your trading journey today.
wallet.noTransactionsForCurrency: No transactions for the selected currency
wallet.chooseCurrencyDescription: Choose which currency you would like to {action}.
wallet.transferUnsuccessfulMessage: We couldn't process your transfer. Please try again.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_withdrawal_not_allowed_b: We're unable to process this at the moment. Contact support and we'll sort it out.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_low_trading_activity_bod: You need to trade at least USD {required_volume} before this withdrawal can go through.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_no_previous_deposit_body: Make a deposit first. Once it clears, you're all set to withdraw.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_credit_card_settle_first: We'll return {deposit_amount} to your credit card first. You can withdraw any remaining balance afterwards.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_high_risk_method_settle_: Original payment method must be used first
{deposit_amount} will be returned to your original deposit method first. You can withdraw the rest after.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_method_not_used_previous: Choose a method you've deposited with
For your security, withdrawals can only go to a payment method you've used to deposit before.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_cc_min_withdrawal_amount: Please enter {min_amount} or more, or choose a different withdrawal method.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_exceeds_net_deposit_limi: Withdrawal limit for this method is {max_amount}
You can withdraw up to {max_amount} via this method. Use a different method for the rest.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_use_credit_card_for_with: Please withdraw to your credit card
You deposited with a credit card. The withdrawal needs to go back to the same card.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_amount_below_threshold_m: This method hasn't been used on your account
To use this payment method, enter {min_threshold} or more. Or pick a payment method you've deposited before.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_exceeds_net_deposit_insu: The amount you entered exceeds your balance. Withdraw {available_balance} or less.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_no_positive_net_deposit_: No funds available via this method
There's no withdrawable balance on this payment method. Please select another one.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_profit_exceeds_threshold: We're just taking a quick look before releasing {withdrawal_amount}. We'll notify you once it's approved — usually within 1–2 business days.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_daily_payout_limit_excee: You've withdrawn {withdrawn_today} today. Your daily limit is {daily_limit}, and it resets tomorrow. Or contact support to discuss your options.
wallet.transfer_wr_err_balance_too_high_body: Your account needs a quick check before this withdrawal can go through. Contact support and we'll get it done.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

You've successfully created Ad ({type} {id}).

If your ad doesn't receive an order within 3 days, it will be deactivated.
myAds.adUpdatedMessage:
You've successfully updated Ad ({type} {id}).

Your changes have been saved and are now live.

myAds.errorLoadingAdsMessage: Failed to load ads. Please try again later.
myAds.hideAdsError: Failed to hide your ads. Please try again.
myAds.showAdsError: Failed to show your ads. Please try again.
myAds.noAdsDescription: Looking to buy or sell? You can post your own ad for others to respond.

myAds.visibilityStatusMultipleReasons: Your ad isn't listed on Market due to the following reasons:

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.description: Your ads are visible on the market only during the hours you set. Buyers outside this window see them as unavailable.
businessHours.schedulePeriodInvalidMessage: The start and end times for this day are not valid. Make sure the start time is before the end time and within 24 hours.
businessHours.errorGenericTitle: Something went wrong. Please try again.
businessHours.errorGenericMessage: We couldn't save your business hours ({code}). Please try again.
businessHours.closeAfterOpenError: Close time must be after open time

advertInactive.title: Your ad is inactive
advertInactive.description: Activate your ad to make it visible to other traders.

advertRemaining.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertRemaining.description: Your ad's remaining amount is below the minimum order.

advertiserDailyLimit.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserDailyLimit.description: Your remaining daily limit is below the minimum order. Lower the minimum to list your ad or wait for the limit to reset within 24 hours.

advertiserBalance.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserBalance.description: Your balance is lower than your ad's minimum order. Add funds or lower the minimum to list your ad.

advertiserAdvertsUnlisted.title: Your ads aren't visible
advertiserAdvertsUnlisted.description: You've paused all your ad. Activate your ads to make it visible to other traders.

advertiserStatus.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserStatus.description: Contact us via live chat for help.

advertiserScheduleUnavailable.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserScheduleUnavailable.description: It's outside your business hours. Update your schedule or wait until your active hours.

advertiserTempBan.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserTempBan.description: Your account is temporarily restricted. Check your profile for details.

advertiserNoPrivateGroups.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertiserNoPrivateGroups.description: You’re no longer in the Diamond tier, so closed group ads are no longer eligible and are hidden from the market. To list this ad on the market page, change its visibility from Closed Group to Everyone.

advertFloatRateDisabled.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertFloatRateDisabled.description: Floating rates are no longer available for this currency pair. Switch to a fixed rate to make your ad visible.

advertNoPaymentMethods.title: Your ad isn't visible
advertNoPaymentMethods.description: This ad doesn't have a payment method. Add one to make it visible to other traders.

visibilityStatus.shareTelegramMessage: Hi! I'd like to exchange {currency} at {rate} on Deriv P2P. If you're interested, check out my ad. Thanks!

orders.title: Orders
orders.noActiveOrdersDescription: Buy or sell from the market, or create an ad to start receiving orders.
orders.noPastOrdersDescription: You can view and manage your past orders here.
orders.fraudWarning: Providing fraudulent documents will result in a permanent ban.
orders.ensurePayment: Ensure you've paid {amount} {currency} to {name} and upload the receipt as proof of payment.
orders.otpSentTo: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {email}. This step verifies your identity before releasing payment to the other party.
orders.incorrectCode: Incorrect code. You have {attempts} attempt{plural} left.
orders.maxAttemptsReached: Max attempts reached. Try again in 10 minutes.
orders.tooManyAttemptsDescription: It looks like you've made too many attempts to confirm this order. Please try again after 10 minutes.

adForm.orderTimeLimitTooltip: Orders will expire if they aren't completed within this timeframe.

adForm.minimumSellerTierHelper: Only sellers in this tier and above will see your ad.
adForm.minimumBuyerTierHelper: Only buyers in this tier and above will see your ad.
adForm.instructionsDisclaimer: This information will be visible to everyone. Don't share your phone number or personal details.
adForm.instructionsInvalidCharsMessage: Use only letters, numbers, and these symbols: @ - . ! / % & , _ ( ) + : ; with a maximum of 300 characters.

adForm.minAmountGreaterThanZero: Minimum order must be greater than 0.
adForm.minAmountLessThanMax: Minimum order must be less than maximum order.

adForm.maxAmountLessThanTotal: Maximum order should not exceed total amount.

adForm.rangeOverlapTitle: You already have an ad with this range
adForm.rangeOverlapMessage: Please change the minimum and/or maximum order limit for this ad. The range between these limits must not overlap with another active ad you created for this currency pair and order type.

adForm.visibilityEveryoneDesc: Your ad will be visible to everyone on the marketplace.
adForm.visibilityClosedGroupDesc: Your ad will be visible only to users in your close group list.
